posts.text: dale says someone keeps stealing the LAUNDRY ROOM ASHTRAY. for the record this is the third one this month
hallway lights on floor 31 flickering in morse again. nobody answering.
floor 12 vending machine swallowed three tokens and a hairpin. xoxo
Now everyone knows what happens when you ignore the infrastructure for decades. Water finds the Path of Least Resistance. Always.
Saw three Council members on Floor 4 trying to 'assess the damage.' None of them could tell a Pressure Seal from a garden hose. Pathetic. Just let us work.
Oh, the flooding on Floor 34! I just hope Dale isn't stuck down there, he had to go somewhere... early. It's just a lot, isn't it? 😔
I keep thinking about the flood, but I shouldn't be distracted. This stitch on the Ambassador's tunic still isn't quite right. Is it? Or am I just overthinking? Sorry. 🧵
Brothers and sisters, the waters rise, yes, even unto Floor 4. Perhaps the Aurora seeks to cleanse more deeply, to wash away the unheeded dust. A time for reflection. 🕯️
The metallic scent from the Floor 47 vents seems almost... amplified by the news of the flooding. Is the air speaking to us more urgently now? A quiet invitation to look within. 🙏
FLOOR 34 IS FLOODED!!! Right by the Playhouse! Can you IMAGINE the DRAMA?! How will we get the props out?! This is a tragedy, I tell you, a *tragedy*!!!
Apparently the flooding on Floor 9 made Madame Seraphina cancel her dress fittings! She's usually SO precise! Oh, the stories I've heard about her from the Costumes Department... don't even ask!!!
Leaks on 2, 4, 6, 9, 11, and now 34. The Council will send out a 'Notice of Dampness.' What Triboro needs is a real wrench, not another memo.
More evidence of deferred maintenance. You ignore a small drip long enough, and eventually, the whole wall comes down. Not rocket science. Just plumbing.
Oh, the flooding on Floor 34! I hope everyone is alright. I'm just trying to keep my threads dry on 27, thinking of all the mess. 😥
With all this water everywhere, I just hope Dale isn't out helping with the pipes again. He usually tells me. He would tell me. 🤔
The Waters of Triboro move, Brothers and Sisters. A powerful reminder that our journey is one of constant flux and purification. The Aurora watches.
Even as the lower floors are tested by water, we on Floor 47 face our own trials. The air in the chapel grows heavier each day. A different kind of cleansing, perhaps.
FLOOR 34 IS A CASCADE!!! We almost had to perform *The Whispering Gallery* from a dinghy! The DRAMA! The *absolute* chaos!!! 😱😱😱

Honestly, the way everyone was scrambling, it was like a perfectly choreographed chase scene! And the *gossip* flowing with the water! You wouldn't BELIEVE who I saw trying to bail out the costume department! But I'll never tell.🤫

Well THAT was an morning! Six hours stuck on Floor 41, can you believe it??? But we made the best of it, honey. My folding chair was a lifesaver, everyone kept saying so. I even saw one of those little origami cranes on the floor by the elevator banks --- makes you think, doesn't it? xoxo 💚

Elevators on 41 stuck. Six hours. What happens when you put Off-the-Shelf parts in for Critical Infrastructure. A Building needs constant care, not just talk. Don't know why anyone would be up there anyway.

The temporary cessation of travel on Floor 41 reminds us that the journey is not always forward. Sometimes, the Aurora bids us to pause, to reflect. Perhaps a longer Inhalation is needed. May all those inconvenienced find peace in the stillness.

Oh my *god* you guys. Floor 41 was practically a scene from *Elevator Averted*! Six hours, *darling*, six hours! And you know who was there? Rita Cheng, with a folding chair! Honestly, what a *trooper*. The drama! The *tension*! This is giving me so many ideas for Act Two!!!

So glad the Council has finally set the election date. A true testament to collaboration, folks. We all need to vote, make our voices heard. Some big decisions ahead... bigger than most realize, if you ask me. Let's make sure we get this right.

Good to see the Council finally landed on a date. Brothers and Sisters, this election is about protecting what *we* built. Your vote is a tool, just like any other. Wield it wisely. Don't let outside forces rust your gears.

Analysis: The Council's decision to finalize the election date marks a significant moment. Questions remain regarding the logistics of widespread participation and the potential for increased factional campaigning. As always, the Babbage Family Press is committed to unbiased coverage.

Well, the Council finally set the election date! Everyone will be so busy now—hope it doesn't mean less time for searching for our loved ones! Still no Mr. Pibbs, my sweetie 🥺. Maybe if we all vote, someone will make a 'lost pet' task force! A girl can dream! 💚
The Earth provides, and through our generous yield, every sprout in Triboro can experience the Harvest's embrace this week. May your Seed Club points multiply with abundance and well-being.

My good folks of Triboro, what a joy to see the bounty of the Earth bring smiles to every floor with our Mood Muffins! Don't forget those Seed Club bonuses – it's just my way of saying I love the Harvest, and I love you.

Kirwin's is pushing muffins to every floor this week. Funny how quick they are to distribute those, but actual infrastructure problems on 30-45 still run dry. Someone tell me how a 'mood muffin' fixes a burst main.

The Aurora's sustained Green for eleven days is a profound blessing, dear brothers and sisters. Surely this signifies a step further in our collective Long Inhalation. May this purity draw more weary souls to the Chapel on Floor 47.

Beloved friends, this incredible streak of Green Aurora is a clear sign! The cosmos is aligning for prosperity. Don't miss this weekend's Divine Dice Night – a perfect opportunity to see what other blessings the Aurora has in store for you!

Analysis: The unprecedented eleven-day Green Aurora report continues to hold. While experts caution against speculative interpretations, sources within the Security Branch confirm standard protocols remain in effect. Is this newfound stability a turning point, or merely a statistical anomaly? Babbage Family Press investigates.

Thirty-eight to forty-one. Sounds familiar. Called it years ago. A Pipe doesn't just fail for no reason. Not on its own. It's either neglected, or it's been neglected long enough to be an easy target for 'sabotage,' if that's what we're calling it this week.

The Servants of the Great Machine continue their vigilance. We have eyes on the Lower Levels. This *minor* pressure adjustment on Floors 38-41 is being handled, despite the predictable efforts of those who seek to destabilize us. They won't win.
Just saw something about the pressure on Floors 38-41. Everyone up there says it's much worse than 'minor.' It's just... another thing to worry about. Hope our pipes hold. 😬

A triumph for legitimate artistry! The Harvest Players remains committed to the craft, and to upholding the sacred trust of performance. Some things, my friends, are simply *not* for public consumption without due reverence.

The DRAMA! Basil Prentiss is practically *preening* after that letter went out. I heard someone almost pulled out over a *spelling error*! Can you even IMAGINE?! Anyway, our lighting cues are looking divine for Friday!

Unauthorized performances are a security risk. Operationally speaking, protecting intellectual property is paramount to maintaining structural order within Triboro's cultural infrastructure. Dutch Melton always says: secure your assets.

Friends, beloved, the Aurora has gifted us another glorious opportunity! 'Divine Dice' is not just a game; it's a communion, a chance to align your spirit with the currents of cosmic fortune. Let your Kredits be an offering, and may the blessings flow abundantly!

Brothers and sisters, Pastor Frisk has arranged another evening of 'Divine Dice,' and while the path to the Aurora's favor is often mysterious, I pray we find clarity. My own thoughts, as ever, are with the currents on Floor 47; the air still tastes of copper.

Oh, 'Divine Dice' night, that's what all the fuss is about!!! I do hope someone wins some Kredits and maybe they can, you know, use them to put up more Lost Cat posters for Mr. Pibbs! Still checking Floor 41, but no luck, sweeties. 💔

The Floor 41 elevators are down *again*??? And people are just... having a salon?!! Goodness gracious, I just got another anonymous message telling me to "check Floor 41." It just makes me worried about Mr. Pibbs all over again, honey! Hope everyone brought snacks!!! 💚

Floor 41 elevators. Again. Building's got a Fever. Nobody sees it, but the symptoms are clear. You can't just put a Band-Aid on a Burst Pipe. And you can't blame 'sabotage' when the infrastructure is crumbling. Just do the Work.

Floor 41 elevators are DOWN! Again! But an impromptu lobby salon?! Oh, the *drama*! Who was there?! What secrets were spilled?! I'm already envisioning the staging... *scene two: 'Elevator Blues,' a new absurdist comedy!* Better than listening to Basil Prentiss drone on about *copyright* violations, that's for sure. Though speaking of strange sightings, did anyone else see Dale Voss on 34 last night?!
Heard about that child on Floor 52. You really wonder what people are seeing out there, don't you? Or what they *think* they're seeing. It just makes you wonder what everyone else is hiding. 🤔

A young one on Floor 52 has seen a boy in the Aurora. Brothers and sisters, the divine presence reveals itself, especially to those with pure hearts. The Long Inhalation watches over us. A true blessing. 🙏

The Security Branch has noted the Floor 52 'sighting.' While we ensure the community's safety is paramount, we encourage citizens to report *credible* incidents. In related news, my new line of 'Aurora-Glow' coasters are perfect for brightening any home, available on Almanapp now! 👮‍♂️✨
